evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt: Open-source music analysis tool for chord recognition, beat tracking, piano visualizer, guitar diagrams, lyrics synchronization, and experimental melody transcription.

evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: ### 🏠 Homepage Interface ![ChordMini Homepage Light](public/homepage.png) ![ChordMini Homepage Dark](public/homepage_dark.png)

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: Clean, intuitive interface for YouTube search, URL input, and recent video access.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: ### 🎵 Beat & Chord Analysis ![Beat Chord Grid](public/beatchord_grid.png) ![Beat Chord with segmentation](public/beatchord_grid_seg.png) ![Beat Chord Grid with Lyrics](public/beatchord_grid_lyrics.png)

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: Chord progression visualization with synchronized beat detection and grid layout with add-on features: Roman Numeral Analysis, Key Modulation Signals, Simplified Chord Notation, Enhanced Chord Correction, and **song segmentation overlays** for structural sections like intro, verse, chorus, bridge, and outro.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Interactive guitar chord diagrams with **accurate fingering patterns** from the official @tombatossals/chords-db database, featuring multiple chord positions, synchronized beat grid integration, and exact slash-chord matching when the database includes a dedicated inversion shape.

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: Real-time piano roll visualization with falling MIDI notes synchronized to chord playback. Features a scrolling chord strip, interactive keyboard highlighting, smoother playback-synced rendering, segmentation-aware dynamics shaping, and **MIDI file export** for importing chord progressions into any DAW.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: ### 🎻 Experimental Melody Transcription ![Melody](public/melody.png) ![Sheet Music](public/sheet.png)

evidence.title: v0.5.4
evidence.excerpt: ## Description - Real instrument soundfonts for chord playback (Acoustic Grand Piano, Acoustic Guitar, Violin) - Loop Playback to loop specific sections of songs - Migrated from Context API to Zustand for all state management - Madmom set as the default beat detection model - Various UI enhancements (Homepage, typography, guitar diagrams, ...) - Capability to change capo position and label mode (shape/sound) for guitar chord diagrams - Piano Visualizer tab with Multi-instrument visualization — falling notes canvas with 88-key piano keyboard and real-time note highlighting - MIDI export — download chord progressions as Standard MIDI Type 1 files with instrument-specific voicing

evidence.title: v0.4.5
evidence.excerpt: ## Description - Roman Numeral Analysis (Beta): Added chord notation display below chord labels to support music theory analysis. - Roman Numeral Analysis in Guitar Chords Tab: Integrated Roman numeral functionality directly into the Guitar Chords tab. - Audio Mixer: Enabled synchronized chord playback alongside video, with beat-aligned chord sounds for improved practice and analysis. - UI Improvements: Centralized the utility dock with a new toggle button for easier access. - Performance Improvements: Migrated toggle handling to UI context provider, reducing unnecessary re-renders and improving responsiveness.

evidence.title: v0.3.5
evidence.excerpt: 1. Chord simplification toggle added 2. FIX: Replaced hardcoded chord database with official @tombatossals/chords-db database for guitar chord diagrams 3. FIX: Beat Detection skipping optimal shift alignment due to first beat detected at or near 0 seconds 4. Minor fixes: Enharmonic Correction Optimization (O(n^2) -> O(n)), miscellaneous UI fixes
